attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_CARTON_IB_IFACE)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.PACKOUT_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.CARTON_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.BP_SERIAL_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.WEIGHT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.CARTON_DIM_UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.CARTON_WEIGHT_UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.PARENT_CARTON_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE,
 (
 select CARTON_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE
 minus
 select CARTON_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_CARTON_IB_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CARTON_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.CARTON_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRTN_IB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME
